---
title: "Session 11: Plenary Pipeline Assembly"
subtitle: "Day 4 · Methodology & Pipeline Assembly (4-2)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 11: Plenary Pipeline Assembly

## 📋 Agenda

- Assemble the project notebook together, step by step
- Pick a mini-project track
- Sample a balanced gold subset from the provided pool

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Assemble the notebook

## Assemble the notebook

<!-- to be added -->

# Pick a track

## Pick a track

<!-- to be added -->

# Sample a balanced gold subset

## Sample a balanced gold subset

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
